ideation: This sequence simulates a deep breath, expanding the chest and then relaxing.  The arms will gently rise and fall in a synchronized motion to mirror the breathing. Frame 1: Arms start slightly raised. Frame 2: Arms extend outward to show chest expansion. Frame 3: Arms return to a relaxed position. Frame 4: Arms gently lower slightly.

frames.beat: arms lift slightly, preparing for the inhale
arms extend outward, chest expands with the breath
arms return to a neutral, relaxed position
